summary: Add 5 research-grade analyzers + harness summary matrix (Chunk 3) for harness comparison and benchmark validation
context: Plan reviewed against two research objectives: (1) comparing agent harness architectures and (2) rigorous quantitative benchmarks. The original plan was strong on descriptive statistics but weak on explanatory analysis (why differences exist) and construct validity (can we trust measurements).
rationale: Added 6 new components: behavior_outcome (correlates coordination behaviors with scores), effect_decomposition (attributes lift to specific mechanisms), learning_curve (session-order trends), interactions (scenario × condition interaction effects with disordinal detection), construct_validity (scorer reliability, dimension intercorrelation), harness_summary (single comparison matrix). These transform the package from benchmark reporter to research tool. All are data-driven and handle arbitrary scenario/condition combinations.

alternatives.option: Add these as a separate phase-2 package
alternatives.reason_rejected: The research-grade analyzers share data structures and fixtures with the base analyzers. Splitting would create duplicate loader/model code and prevent the recommendations synthesizer from incorporating findings across all dimensions.
